vocab.example: I would love to walk through the ancient villages of Tuscany at a snail's pace, absorbing every architectural detail.

vocab.meaning: mọi thứ đều nằm trong tầm tay, có vô số cơ hội
vocab.example: When you have a comfortable pair of boots and a month of leave, the world is your oyster in terms of where you can hike.

vocab.meaning: hồi sức, tìm lại năng lượng để tiếp tục nỗ lực
vocab.example: I imagine that after several hours of trekking the Great Wall, I’d finally get my second wind as the sun began to set.

vocab.meaning: rất gần, chỉ cách một quãng ngắn
vocab.example: I’d choose a coastal path that is just a stone's throw from the crashing waves of the Atlantic.

vocab.meaning: lúc quá nhiều lúc lại quá ít (áp dụng cho cảnh vật hoặc tiện ích trên đường đi)
vocab.example: Hiking in the desert is often a case of feast or famine; you see nothing for miles, then suddenly stumble upon a breathtaking oasis.

vocab.meaning: ngẫu hứng, không chuẩn bị trước
vocab.example: I don't want a rigid itinerary; I'd rather decide my walking route off the cuff based on where the locals suggest.
A long walk would allow me to explore every nook and cranny of the Kyoto forest that a tour bus would simply bypass.
The scenery in the Swiss Alps is so captivating that it’s incredibly easy to lose track of time while wandering the trails.

vocab.meaning: thưởng ngoạn, cảm nhận toàn bộ những gì đang diễn ra
vocab.example: I’d find a high ridge during my walk, sit for a moment, and just take it all in—the silence, the air, and the vastness.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực hết sức (thường là khi bắt đầu một hành trình gian khó)
vocab.example: Facing the steep incline of a mountain pass, you really have to put your best foot forward to reach the summit.
